summary: Problem 23 of arXiv:2506.08810 asks for a characterisation of finite tournaments H admitting a countable H-free tournament G such that reversing any single arc introduces H as a subtournament—a tournament analogue of induced saturation. The paper itself establishes two base cases: no finite G exists for the directed triangle (but the rationals under < provide an infinite one), while the transitive tournament on 3 vertices does admit a finite example. No follow-up paper resolving the general question was found in a broad web search conducted in May 2026.
search_queries: tournament induced saturation arc reversal countable subtournament 2506.08810
tournament induced saturated arc reversal Bonamy Groenland Johnston Morrison Scott 2025
induced saturation tournament "arc reversal" "countable" graph theory 2025 2026
"tournament saturation" OR "induced-saturated tournament" subtournament "reversing arcs" 2025 2026 arxiv
notes: No follow-up found across 5 web calls. The conjecture was posted September 2025 and is under one year old; absence of indexed follow-up supports high-confidence open status.
